text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Gemma 3 Technical Report" is a real, verified publication at arXiv:2503.19786 (March 25, 2025). The cited author list (starting with "Gemma Team, Aishwarya Kamath, Johan Ferret, Shreya Pathak..." etc.) substantially matches the actual author list; the automated checker's "mismatch" is merely a formatting issue where the team name "Gemma" was parsed as the first author rather than "Gemma Team," which is acceptable shorthand for a large 200+ author collaborative paper.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.19786
